name: Cherry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. If the cherries are extremely well defrosted and drained, use 2 tablespoons cornstarch; if they still have a high moisture content, use 3 tablespoons cornstarch.
2. In a medium saucepan, combine sugar, cornstarch, and salt until well mixed and lump-free.
3. Gradually add cherry juice, stirring until smooth. Cook over medium heat and stir until thick and clear.
4. Stir in butter, almond extract, and red food coloring.
5. Cool for 10 minutes.
6. Gently toss the cherries to coat them with the filling.
7. Spoon into an unbaled pie shell.
8. Add a vented top pastry or lattice strips. Flute edges and cover fluted edges with foil strips.
9. Bake for 30 minutes.
10. Remove foil. Return to oven for 10 more minutes.
11. Check that the filling is simmering.
12. Remove from oven. Cool on a rack.
Makes one 9-inch pie.
